title: agrostis odorata
intro: Agrostis odorata, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agrostis odorata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and hay fever, as well as its potential to reduce allergies and improve digestion. Agrostis odorata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
